meta.title: How to build Multi Agents for FINANCE: Outperforming Anthropic
meta.description:
Anthropic's Claude CoWork plugin for the financial sector were of interest to me, therefore I examined the skill.md files for different financial agents as designed by Anthropic.  
Plus a new, impressive publication of an agentic system for the complete financial sector (international) and new ideas and methods how to train open-source models for the specific financial tasks offers new insights into AI Agent and multi-agent systems for Finance (wealth management, private equity, investment proposals, equity research and more). 

All rights w/ authors:
FIRE: A COMPREHENSIVE BENCHMARK FOR
FINANCIAL INTELLIGENCE AND REASONING EVALUATION.
Xiyuan Zhang1*, Huihang Wu2*, Jiayu Guo3* , Zhenlin Zhang2, Yiwei Zhang2
Liangyu Huo1, Xiaoxiao Ma1, Jiansong Wan1, Xuewei Jiao1, Yi Jing1, Jian Xie1
from
1 Du Xiaoman Technology
2 The PBC School of Finance, Tsinghua University
3 The School of Finance, Renmin University of China

#airesearch 
#financejobs 
#aifinance 
#scienceexplained

errors:
Could not retrieve a transcript for the video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-HjPWrKavyA! This is most likely caused by:

YouTube is blocking requests from your IP. This usually is due to one of the following reasons:
- You have done too many requests and your IP has been blocked by YouTube
- You are doing requests from an IP belonging to a cloud provider (like AWS, Google Cloud Platform, Azure, etc.). Unfortunately, most IPs from cloud providers are blocked by YouTube.

Ways to work around this are explained in the "Working around IP bans" section of the README (https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api?tab=readme-ov-file#working-around-ip-bans-requestblocked-or-ipblocked-exception).


If you are sure that the described cause is not responsible for this error and that a transcript should be retrievable, please create an issue at https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api/issues. Please add which version of youtube_transcript_api you are using and provide the information needed to replicate the error. Also make sure that there are no open issues which already describe your problem!
